name: College Wesleyan Church
description: Come play pickleball at College Wesleyan Church in Marion, IN! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include food and restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Grant County YMCA
description: Grant County YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Marion, IN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Matter Park
description: Come play pickleball at Matter Park in Marion, IN! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Taylor University Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Taylor University Courts in Upland, IN! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.
